purpose: Deterministic scorer smoke and ordering regression fixture for the synthetic saved-search calibration slice.

cases.title: Senior Director, Platform Engineering
cases.description: Lead platform engineering, developer experience, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and cloud reliability for a self-service developer platform.
cases.rationale: Direct alignment with target function, seniority, and verified platform evidence.

cases.title: Director, Infrastructure Engineering
cases.description: Own infrastructure modernization, reliability, and cloud operations for engineering teams.
cases.rationale: Strong seniority and adjacent domain fit, but less explicit developer-platform language.

cases.title: Engineering Manager, Internal Tools
cases.description: Manage internal tools delivery with some CI/CD work and moderate cloud operations exposure.
cases.rationale: Some relevant signals but weaker seniority and location alignment.

cases.title: Finance Operations Manager
cases.description: Own finance operations reporting, procurement workflows, and vendor invoices.
cases.rationale: Outside target function and lacks platform or infrastructure evidence.
